examples: Once outside the inner breakwater, we began to unfurl all the sails.
This ACTS as a breakwater and protects the islands from the sea.
Passed entrance of breakwater. We are navigating toward anchorage with caution.
The Douglas Quay at Braye Harbour, shown before the Breakwater was constructed, is on the 39p stamp.
Offshore breakwater: structure parallel to the shore, usually positioned in the sea, that protects the shore from waves.
